001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import android.app.Activity;
004import android.content.Context;
005import android.os.CancellationSignal;
006import android.util.Base64;
007import android.util.Log;
008import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
009import androidx.credentials.ClearCredentialStateRequest;
010import androidx.credentials.Credential;
011import androidx.credentials.CredentialManager;
012import androidx.credentials.CredentialManagerCallback;
013import androidx.credentials.CustomCredential;
014import androidx.credentials.GetCredentialRequest;
015import androidx.credentials.GetCredentialResponse;
016import androidx.credentials.exceptions.ClearCredentialException;
017import androidx.credentials.exceptions.GetCredentialException;
018import com.google.android.libraries.identity.googleid.GetGoogleIdOption;
019import com.google.android.libraries.identity.googleid.GoogleIdTokenCredential;
020import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
022import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
023import java.util.concurrent.Executor;
024import javax.inject.Inject;
025import javax.inject.Singleton;
026import org.json.JSONObject;
027
028/**
029 * Repository implementation for Google authentication operations.
030 */
031@Singleton
032public class GoogleAuthRepositoryImpl implements GoogleAuthRepository {
033
034  private static final String TAG = GoogleAuthRepositoryImpl.class.getSimpleName();
035
036  private final CredentialManager credentialManager;
037  private final String clientId;
038  private final Executor directExecutor = Runnable::run;
039
040  /**
041   * Constructs a GoogleAuthRepositoryImpl with the specified application context.
042   *
043   * @param context the application context for accessing resources and credential manager
044   */
045  @Inject
046  GoogleAuthRepositoryImpl(@ApplicationContext Context context) {
047    credentialManager = CredentialManager.create(context);
048    clientId = context.getString(R.string.client_id);
049  }
050
051  @Override
052  public CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential> signInQuickly(Activity activity) {
053    return attemptSignIn(activity, true, false);
054  }
055
056  @Override
057  public CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential> signIn(Activity activity) {
058    return attemptSignIn(activity, false, false);
059  }
060
061  @Override
062  public CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential> refreshToken(
063      Activity activity, GoogleIdTokenCredential credential) {
064    if (!isTokenExpired(credential.getIdToken())) {
065      return CompletableFuture.completedFuture(credential);
066    }
067    return attemptSignIn(activity, true, true);
068  }
069
070  @Override
071  public CompletableFuture<Void> signOut() {
072    return CompletableFuture.runAsync(() -> {
073      ClearCredentialStateRequest request = new ClearCredentialStateRequest();
074      CancellationSignal cancellationSignal = new CancellationSignal();
075
076      credentialManager.clearCredentialStateAsync(
077          request,
078          cancellationSignal,               // or null
079          directExecutor,                   // run callbacks on caller thread
080          new CredentialManagerCallback<Void, ClearCredentialException>() {
081            @Override
082            public void onResult(@NonNull Void result) {
083              Log.d(TAG, "Credential state cleared.");
084            }
085
086            @Override
087            public void onError(@NonNull ClearCredentialException e) {
088              Log.e(TAG, "Error clearing credential state", e);
089            }
090          }
091      );
092    });
093  }
094
095  /**
096   * Attempts to sign in the user using the credential manager.
097   *
098   * @param activity the activity context for the sign-in flow
099   * @param filterByAuthorizedAccounts whether to filter by authorized accounts
100   * @param autoSelect whether to automatically select if only one account is available
101   * @return a CompletableFuture containing the Google ID token credential
102   */
103  private CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential> attemptSignIn(
104      Activity activity, boolean filterByAuthorizedAccounts, boolean autoSelect) {
105
106    CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential> future = new CompletableFuture<>();
107
108    GetGoogleIdOption googleIdOption = new GetGoogleIdOption.Builder()
109        .setFilterByAuthorizedAccounts(filterByAuthorizedAccounts)
110        .setAutoSelectEnabled(autoSelect)
111        .setServerClientId(clientId)
112        .build();
113
114    GetCredentialRequest request = new GetCredentialRequest.Builder()
115        .addCredentialOption(googleIdOption)
116        .build();
117
118    CancellationSignal cancellationSignal = new CancellationSignal();
119
120    credentialManager.getCredentialAsync(
121        activity,                        // Context
122        request,                         // GetCredentialRequest
123        cancellationSignal,              // or null
124        directExecutor,                  // Executor
125        new CredentialManagerCallback<GetCredentialResponse, GetCredentialException>() {
126          @Override
127          public void onResult(@NonNull GetCredentialResponse response) {
128            try {
129              Credential credential = response.getCredential();
130              if (credential instanceof CustomCredential
131                  && GoogleIdTokenCredential.TYPE_GOOGLE_ID_TOKEN_CREDENTIAL
132                  .equals(credential.getType())) {
133                GoogleIdTokenCredential idTokenCredential =
134                    GoogleIdTokenCredential.createFrom(
135                        ((CustomCredential) credential).getData());
136                future.complete(idTokenCredential);
137              } else {
138                future.completeExceptionally(
139                    new IllegalStateException(
140                        "Credential is not a Google ID token credential"));
141              }
142            } catch (Exception e) {
143              future.completeExceptionally(
144                  new SignInRequiredException("Google Sign In required", e));
145            }
146          }
147
148          @Override
149          public void onError(@NonNull GetCredentialException e) {
150            future.completeExceptionally(
151                new SignInRequiredException("Google Sign In failed", e));
152          }
153        }
154    );
155
156    return future;
157  }
158
159  /**
160   * Checks if a JWT token has expired.
161   *
162   * @param idToken the JWT token to check
163   * @return true if the token has expired or cannot be parsed, false otherwise
164   */
165  private boolean isTokenExpired(@NonNull String idToken) {
166    try {
167      String[] parts = idToken.split("\\.");
168      if (parts.length < 2) {
169        return true;
170      }
171      String payloadJson =
172          new String(Base64.decode(parts[1], Base64.URL_SAFE | Base64.NO_WRAP));
173      JSONObject payload = new JSONObject(payloadJson);
174      long expiration = payload.getLong("exp");
175      long nowPlusSkew = System.currentTimeMillis() / 1000L + 5 * 60;
176      return expiration < nowPlusSkew;
177    } catch (Exception e) {
178      Log.e(TAG, "Failed to parse ID token", e);
179      return true;
180    }
181  }
182}
